headlines.description: — The start of a new era couldn't have gone much better for the Philadelphia Eagles.
headlines.shortLinkText: New era in Philly: Hurts 3 TDs, Eagles rout Falcons 32-6

headlines.description: — Knowing it was going to take the Steelers' new-look offense time to find its footing, Ben Roethlisberger was counting on Pittsburgh’s defense to keep the score close.
headlines.shortLinkText: Steelers rally to beat Bills 23-16 to open season

headlines.description: — The Minnesota Vikings overcame a choppy start to storm back and tie the game after regulation against the Cincinnati Bengals.
headlines.shortLinkText: Vikings have plenty to clean up after OT loss to Bengals

headlines.description: — Nick Bosa was ready to kick back and relax while the San Francisco 49ers coasted to a season-opening victory.
headlines.shortLinkText: 49ers build 28-point lead, hold on for 41-33 win over Lions

headlines.description: — Kylar Murray provided a dazzling hint of how much better he might be in his third NFL season. Chandler Jones made it very clear why the Arizona Cardinals need to sign him to the new contract he wants — and soon.
headlines.shortLinkText: Murray gets 5 TDs, Jones 5 sacks as Cards rout Titans 38-13

headlines.description: — Russell Wilson looked right at home in Seattle's new offense.
headlines.shortLinkText: Efficient Wilson leads Seahawks past Colts 28-16 in opener

headlines.description: — Brandon Staley and Justin Herbert shared a smile and shook hands outside the locker room before the new Los Angeles Chargers coach congratulated the second-year quarterback on a job well done.
headlines.shortLinkText: Herbert throws for 337 yards, Chargers beat Washington 20-16

events.name: New York Jets at Carolina Panthers

headlines.description: — If beating the team that traded him gave Sam Darnold any vindication, the fourth-year quarterback certainly wasn't sharing it.
headlines.shortLinkText: Darnold, defense lead Panthers past Jets 19-14 in opener

headlines.description: — With new coach Urban Meyer’s championship college resume and No. 1 overall pick Trevor Lawrence leading the offense, the Jacksonville Jaguars were supposed to be much-improved this season.
headlines.shortLinkText: New coach, new QB, same bad Jaguars in 37-21 loss to Texans

events.name: Cleveland Browns at Kansas City Chiefs

headlines.description: — Every time the Kansas City Chiefs needed a big play on Sunday, their magician under center produced the kind of mesmerizing moment that left the Cleveland Browns shaking their heads in awe and frustration.
headlines.shortLinkText: Mahomes dazzles as Chiefs rally for 33-29 win over Browns

events.name: Miami Dolphins at New England Patriots

headlines.description: — Xavien Howard was one of the NFL’s best players at causing turnovers in 2020. He was back at it Sunday to help the Dolphins preserve a victory to open this season.
headlines.shortLinkText: Tua's TD pass, turnover by Howard lift Dolphins over Pats

events.name: Green Bay Packers at New Orleans Saints

headlines.description: — Jameis Winston and the hurricane-displaced Saints looked right at home in northeast Florida — no doubt to the delight of fans rebuilding homes and lives back in New Orleans.
headlines.shortLinkText: Winston, Saints, overcome displacement, pound Packers 38-3

events.name: Denver Broncos at New York Giants

headlines.description: — For the first time since Peyton Manning retired after winning Super Bowl 50, the Denver Broncos may have a quarterback. All it took was 11 tries.
headlines.shortLinkText: Teddy Bridgewater throws 2 TDs, Broncos pound Giants 27-13

events.name: Chicago Bears at Los Angeles Rams

headlines.description: — Matthew Stafford's second pass for the Los Angeles Rams traveled 53 majestic yards through the air and dropped right into the hands of Van Jefferson, who fell down untouched, stood up and scored.
headlines.shortLinkText: Stafford leads LA Rams past Bears 34-14 in dynamic debut
